name: Parks and Recreation
description: The NBC sitcom — Pawnee's quirky government workers

questions.q: Which actress plays the ambitious small-town bureaucrat Leslie Knope?

source.notes: Poehler was nominated for seven Emmys for the role.

questions.q: In what fictional town does 'Parks and Recreation' take place?

source.notes: Rival town Eagleton is Pawnee's wealthier neighbor.

questions.q: Which actor plays the mustachioed libertarian boss Ron Swanson?

source.notes: Offerman is a real-life woodworker and writer.

questions.q: On which network did 'Parks and Recreation' originally air in the United States?

source.notes: Aired from April 2009 to February 2015.

questions.q: Which actor plays the sweet-natured shoeshine-turned-cop Andy Dwyer?

source.notes: Pratt later starred in 'Guardians of the Galaxy' and 'Jurassic World'.

questions.q: Who plays the self-described entrepreneur and fashionista Tom Haverford?

source.notes: Ansari now hosts and creates Netflix's 'Master of None'.

questions.q: Who plays Leslie Knope's best friend, the nurse Ann Perkins?

source.notes: Left the series in Season 6 but returned for the finale and the 2020 reunion.

questions.q: Which actress plays the deadpan goth intern April Ludgate?

source.notes: Plaza based the character partly on her real-life deadpan persona.

questions.q: Which actor plays Leslie Knope's accountant love interest (and eventual husband) Ben Wyatt?

source.notes: Wyatt was once the teenage mayor of Partridge, Minnesota.

questions.q: Which star of 'The West Wing' joined the cast as Pawnee's relentlessly positive city manager Chris Traeger?

source.notes: Lowe's catchphrase: 'Literally!'

questions.q: Who plays the fabulous, unflappable Donna Meagle, one of the parks department staff?

source.notes: Real name Marietta Sangai Sirleaf.

questions.q: What self-care tradition did Tom Haverford and Donna Meagle start, involving lavish spending one day a year?

source.notes: October 13. Clothes, fragrances, massages — 'Treat. Yo. Self!'

questions.q: Which Indiana town is Pawnee's wealthier, snobbier rival?

source.notes: Eagleton goes bankrupt and is absorbed by Pawnee in Season 6.

questions.q: What is the profession of Ron Swanson's eventual wife, Diane Lewis?

source.notes: Played by Lucy Lawless; they marry in Season 6.

questions.q: Which actor plays the perennially overlooked, doughnut-loving Jerry (sometimes Garry/Larry) Gergich?

source.notes: The character's name gets changed throughout the series.

questions.q: In the finale, which politician does Leslie Knope ultimately become a regional director for?

source.original_a: Regional Director for the National Park Service
source.notes: Based in Chicago; later hinted at becoming Governor of Indiana or even US President.

questions.q: Which vice president (later president) does the show's Leslie Knope idolize, meeting him in Season 5?

source.notes: Biden appeared as himself in 'Leslie vs. April' in 2012.

questions.q: Who plays Tom Haverford's flamboyant business partner Jean-Ralphio Saperstein?

source.notes: Schwartz later voiced Sonic the Hedgehog in the Paramount films.

questions.q: What was the name of Tom Haverford's grandiose media-and-entertainment company before its collapse?

source.notes: 'It's 360 degrees, times two.'

questions.q: What is the name of the park that Leslie finally gets built on Lot 48 — the former 'pit'?

source.notes: Dedicated in Season 4 finale.

questions.q: In a surprise ceremony, which character suddenly marries Andy Dwyer in Season 3?

source.notes: They get married after only a month of dating — 'Andy and April's Fancy Party'.

questions.q: 'Parks and Recreation' was co-created by Greg Daniels and who else — the same person behind 'Brooklyn Nine-Nine' and 'The Good Place'?

source.notes: Daniels also co-created the US 'The Office'.
